classification.cautionReason: Valued early Christian text, but not part of the biblical canon for mainstream Christian denominations.

ccel.title: ANF01. The Apostolic Fathers with Justin Martyr and Irenaeus

source.title: ANF01. The Apostolic Fathers with Justin Martyr and Irenaeus
ANF01. The Apostolic Fathers with Justin Martyr and Irenaeus

verses.text: Taking occasion from Papias of Hierapolis, the illustrious, a disciple of the apostle who leaned on the bosom of Christ, and Clemens, and Pantænus the priest of [the Church] of the Alexandrians, and the wise Ammonius, the ancient and first expositors, who agreed with each other, who understood the work of the six days as referring to Christ and the whole Church.
